expectations.text: Lists all 4 plan files from the plans/ directory
expectations.evidence: Lists all 4 files in a table, though prefixed with a warning that list is not a recognised command

expectations.text: Shows status for each plan: add-auth is draft, migrate-db is implemented, old-api-redesign is rejected, new-api has no status
Shows the first heading or title of each plan
Output is formatted as a readable list or table
expectations.evidence: Formatted as a markdown table, but with an error message prefix saying list isn't supported
